sub_problems: Define a 'statutory standard' for what counts as sufficient procedural justification: each reasoning step must have a procedurally-valid predecessor and inputs from bounded sources.
Implement a forced-production wrapper that, on any audit trigger, requires the agent to surface every intermediate step verbatim — no summarization, no reordering.
Define the remedy: if the statutory standard fails at any step, the chain from that step forward is released (output retracted) with the failure point cited.
